Reusable Settings Center: descriptors, registry, UI, audit, runtime contract apply, env proposals and contextual help
descriptors.py: Dataclass contract for setting descriptors and safe context masking
registry.py: Registry loading domain descriptors from core/accounts/ai/memory
policies.py: Server-side permissions for settings and user management
admin.py: Django Admin registration for Settings Center audit models
contract_services.py: Runtime contract preview/apply service with validation and atomic writes
env_services.py: .env effective status and proposal generation service
help_services.py: Contextual help context and mini-chat response service
forms.py: Forms for contracts, env proposals, help and user workflows
views.py: Django template/HTMX views for Settings Center
